message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "U6-C1",
      "title": "Equilibrium Mastery",
      "description": "Understanding dynamic equilibrium, factors affecting it, and applications in acid-base chemistry.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply the Law of Chemical Equilibrium to homogeneous and heterogeneous systems.",
        "Analyze the relationship between reaction quotient (Q), equilibrium constant (K), and Gibbs Energy (G).",
        "Predict shifts in chemical equilibria based on changes in concentration, temperature, or pressure.",
        "Calculate pH and buffer capacity for ionic equilibrium involving acids, bases, and salts."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Equilibrium",
      "chapter_name": "Equilibrium"
    },
    {
      "code": "U7-C1",
      "title": "Redox Reaction Analysis",
      "description": "Identifying oxidation-reduction processes through electron transfer and oxidation numbers.",
      "competencies": [
        "Distinguish between classical definitions of oxidation/reduction and modern electron-transfer concepts.",
        "Assign correct oxidation numbers to elements in compounds and ions.",
        "Analyze electrode processes involved in redox reactions."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Redox Reactions",
      "chapter_name": "Redox Reactions"
    },
    {
      "code": "U8-C1",
      "title": "Organic Chemistry Fundamentals",
      "description": "Mastering structural representation, nomenclature, and reaction mechanisms in organic chemistry.",
      "competencies": [
        "Represent organic structures using various classification systems and understand carbon tetravalence.",
        "Apply IUPAC rules for naming compounds and identify isomeric relationships.",
        "Elucidate fundamental concepts of organic reaction mechanisms.",
        "Perform qualitative and quantitative analysis to purify organic substances."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques",
      "chapter_name": "Some basic Principles and Techniques"
    },
    {
      "code": "U9-C1",
      "title": "Hydrocarbon Classification & Properties",
      "description": "Differentiating hydrocarbons by structure (alkanes, alkenes, alkynes, aromatics) and assessing their safety.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify hydrocarbons into alkanes, alkenes, alkynes, and aromatic compounds based on bonding.",
        "Describe the structural characteristics of aromatic hydrocarbons.",
        "Evaluate the carcinogenicity and toxicity associated with specific hydrocarbon classes."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Hydrocarbons",
      "chapter_name": "Hydrocarbons"
    }
  ]
}
